market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: EV Charger Home – 15 mins to BHX & NEC
Budget Stay with EV Plug, Near Airports
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to The Grazing Guest House, a bright, fully‑equipped entire home perfect for up to four guests. Located just a 15‑minute drive from both Birmingham Airport (BHX) and Nottingham East Midlands Airport (NEC), the house offers the convenience of an on‑site EV charger for electric‑vehicle travelers.  

The modern interior features a comfortable living area, a well‑appointed kitchen with all essential appliances, and two cozy bedrooms with fresh linens. The bathroom is stocked with towels and basic toiletries. With a nightly rate of £137.60, you’re paying 11 % less than the city’s median nightly price of £154.60, delivering exceptional value.  

Rated 4.97 stars from 257 reviews, Sandra’s guests consistently praise the cleanliness and the thoughtful touches throughout the home. Over the next 90 days the calendar shows a 44.6 % occupancy rate (50 open nights), indicating room for growth.  

Whether you’re in town for business, a weekend getaway, or a family visit, The Grazing Guest House combines affordability, convenience, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Book now to enjoy a stress‑free stay with easy airport access and a dedicated EV charging spot.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑quality exterior shot that shows the EV charger and parking area as the cover photo; guests first notice convenience and parking.
key_diagnosis: Add the three high‑value amenities (outdoor space, dedicated parking, entertainment) – currently 0 listed, and they can help lift occupancy from the current 44.6 % toward the market median of 47.8 %.
Rewrite the title to spotlight the 11 % price advantage and EV charger; the current 50‑character title lacks SEO focus and click‑through power.

Upload at least 12 professional photos covering living room, kitchen, bedrooms, bathroom, exterior, and the EV charger, then set the exterior with charger as the cover – the listing’s photo count is unknown but likely very low, driving the 1/10 image score.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is 11 % below the city median, yet your 90‑day occupancy sits at 44.6 %—there’s clear upside.
